depends_on.name: element_id
depends_on.documentation: The document ID of the ndi.element this reverse correlation was computed for.

depends_on.name: stimulus_presentation_id
depends_on.documentation: The document ID of the stimulus_presentation that drove the responses.

fields.name: method
fields.documentation: Name of the reverse-correlation method used (e.g., 'spike-triggered average', 'STC'). Candidate for promotion to ontology_term.

fields.name: dimension_labels
fields.documentation: Comma-separated names for the axes of the reverse-correlation kernel inherited from ngrid (e.g., 'Time, X, Y').
